title: Page blanche
original_title: Nhân Dân Là Trang Giấy Trắng
overview: Vixna and her two children are lured from the safety of Paris by her husband, a officer in Pol Pot's army, back to Cambodia where they undergo brainwashing and enslavement by the Khmer Rouge.
